'''Corey Johnson''' (born 16 November 2000) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

==Playing career==
===Leeds Rhinos===
In 2019, he made professional debut on loan at [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] and made his Super League début in Leeds' final home game of the [[Super League XXIV|2019 season]].<ref>{{cite news |url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/11948044/leeds-rhinos-corey-johnson-quits-rugby-league-aged-just-19 |title=Leeds Rhinos' Corey Johnson quits rugby league aged just 19 |work=Sky Sports |date=3 March 2020 |accessdate=3 March 2020}}</ref> Despite being less than two years into a four-year contract to stay at Leeds until 2022,<ref>{{cite news |url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-academy-aces-earn-revised-longer-term-deals-rhinos-583808 |title=Leeds Rhinos: Academy aces earn revised longer-term deals at Rhinos |work=Yorkshire Evening Post |date=19 July 2018 |accessdate=3 March 2020}}</ref> Johnson was released from his contract in March 2020 announcing his retirement from the game to focus on life away from rugby league.<ref>{{cite news |url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/highly-rated-leeds-rhinos-youngster-corey-johnson-quits-rugby-league-2006133 |title=Highly-rated Leeds Rhinos youngster Corey Johnson quits rugby league |work=Yorkshire Evening Post |date=2 March 2020 |accessdate=3 March 2020}}</ref>

===York RLFC (loan)===
On 8 July 2021, it was reported that he had come out of retirement, re-signed for [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] and then signed for [[York City Knights|York RLFC]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=8 Jul 2021|accessdate=8 Jul 2021|title=Youngster re-signs for Leeds and is loaned out to York|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/youngster-re-signs-for-leeds-and-is-loaned-out-to-york/}}</ref>

===Bradford Bulls (loan)===
On 2 December 2021, it was reported that he had signed for [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=2 Dec 2021|accessdate=2 Dec 2021|title=Leeds loan three players to Bradford|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leeds-loan-three-players-to-bradford/}}</ref>

===Bradford Bulls (loan)===
On 29 February 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Bradford Bulls|date=29 Feb 2024|accessdate=16 Apr 2024|title=COREY JOHNSON JOINS THE BULLS!|url=https://www.bradfordbulls.co.uk/article/2339/corey-johnson-joins-the-bulls}}</ref>

===Halifax Panthers (DR)===
On 8 May 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Halifax Panthers]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on [[RFL dual registration|DR]] loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Yorkshire Live|date=8 May 2024|accessdate=21 Jun 2024|author=Matthew Shaw|title=Leeds Rhinos playmaker set for fresh Championship loan move|url=https://www.examinerlive.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-championship-loan-move-29130489}}</ref>

===Sheffield Eagles===
On 3 November 2024, it was reported that he had signed for [[Sheffield Eagles|Sheffield]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=3 Nov 2024|author=Drew Darbyshire|title=Former Leeds Rhinos hooker makes Championship move following Super League departure|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leeds-rhinos-corey-johnson-championship-move-super-league-exit}}</ref>
